description: Style NoteEntrenched in playful prints and summery colours, ipanema sandals reference the Brazilian city of ipanema - its even made in Brazil. We know you love a brand with a cause - did you know that iPanema works with supermodel Gisele Bundchen to conserve the rainforests of the Amazon? Apart from the obvious reasons why we love this (and why you should buy it) this soft sandal is perfect to beat the summer heat! Product DetailsSlim gold T-straps with brandingSoft white curved footbed with whimsical printSingle piece PVC moulded, flexible outsole with horizontal grooves, upraised at the heelMaterial and CarePVC, rubberWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not dry in direct sunlight
